name: heart-vb
description: Heart Venture Builder toolkit aligned z firmowym procesem VB (DD by Heart — 12 non-negotiable milestones w 4 fazach: Discovery → Creation → Validation → Fundraising). 47 skilli w 9 kategoriach + 4 UserPromptSubmit hooki + 1 PreCompact learning-prompt hook (proactive 'czy chcesz coś zapisać przed compaction'). Wszystkie hooki auto-loaded w Claude Code CLI/IDE i Claude Desktop Cowork. Core: heart-vb-process master orchestrator (routing po milestone vocabulary lub full process pipeline). Pełny vb-process: assessment (Krok 1 — 12-row checker), kickoff (Krok 2 — risk ranking + sprints), bi-weekly-summary (Krok 3 — co 2 tyg. learnings + red flags), fundraising-readiness (Krok 4 — go/no-go gate), napkin-math (M5), exit-strategy (M6), cap-table-helper (M7), investor-early-signal (M3 reality check). Plus: heart-orchestrate Pattern E/F, self-improving (si:* — per-session w Cowork, cross-session w CLI), product discovery/teardown/experiment, financial modeling, deal screening, pitch/IC/investor comms, 4 sector contexts (HealthTech/Academic/Energy/FinTech), brainstorming, status (/heart-vb:status). Hooki auto-suggesta skill/cowork/model/research-tool. Bundle z attribution (MIT).
